title: Alchemix - REKT
relevance_summary: Exploitation of collateralization mechanism leading to undercollateralized state

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints alETH without corresponding debt assignment
prevention.trigger: ALETH_MINT -> no corresponding DEBT_ASSIGNMENT in same tx

red_flags: minting alETH without corresponding debt assignment
summary: Alchemix protocol allowed minting of alETH without corresponding debt assignment, leading to undercollateralization and potential rug-pull. A guard could have blocked such transactions to prevent the exploit.
